checks.notes: The weekly report can be scanned through conclusion, progress, and next actions.

The export time and API-stability risk are retained without unsupported elaboration.
The fixture avoids generic week-in-review filler and unresolved placeholders.
Regular Lumen is suitable for a warm but structured weekly update.
The next owner and monitoring action are clear enough for follow-up.

summary: Strong weekly-progress fixture with explicit status and next-action information.
